title: CoffeePBR
description: Vanilla style PBR resourcepack pack created by Coffee
body:
# Vanilla style PBR resourcepack pack created by Coffee

**Requirements:**

**_OptiFine or Iris Shaders_**

_**you need to check that if your shader support LabPBR**_

_**shader pack that supports PBR features, such as Nostalgia Shaders, BSL Shaders, or Kappa Shaders.**_

# I hope everyone likes my texture pack

## If you like the texture packs I create, you can consider sponsoring me for a drink to support the long-term updates of the CoffeePBR texture pack.You can sponsor me on [ifdian](https://ifdian.net/a/CoffeeXiaoGuan)﻿
